channel.title: tech startup on What I read every week
channel.description: Recent content in tech startup on What I read every week

item.title: What I read this week - 2023/02/17
item.description: Not in doing what you like, but in liking what you do is the secret of happiness — J.M. Barrie Articles 🔗 Higher Rates Will Lead to the Next Generation of Great Tech Startups Microsoft thinks AI can beat Google at search — CEO Satya Nadella explains why / AI is coming for your browser, your social media, and your operating system, too. Four Charts Reveal Seismic Shifts in Global Energy Within One Lifetime Going Through Levels of Wealth References 🔗 Generative AI – The Future of Creative Work How to Summarize a Large Text with GPT-3
